content_body: What a fabulous weekend we shared with our staff in the beautiful cabins Outlaw Ridge, A Rolling River, and The Rivers Edge. This is our second year to retreat to the mountains to relax and enjoy fellowship, and we look forward to each trip and are never disappointed. The cabins are gorgeous, clean, and spacious, and the view can't be beat. The beautiful Toccoa River rocks you to sleep at night. We can't wait to return next year.
title: Christmas Staff Retreat
